column1: # Dense fuzzy physics-membership μ — MiniLM cosine to the 'Physics' anchor (NO training).
# model: sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2; clamp: to_membership (cosine∈[-1,1] → μ∈[0,1]); names verbatim from the category graph.
# Provenance: gen_dense_mu.py over data/benchmark/10k/category_parent.tsv. A raw pretrained-embedding prior (coarse semantic proximity), NOT the trained cosine-μ
# encoder and NOT authoritative — its job is DENSITY (a μ for every node) so the gated cone / IC / Lin machinery stops pruning through unscored connectors.
# Format: name<TAB>μ, μ∈[0,1]. '#' lines are comments.
